creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The patch contained in this port was applied by Steve and myself. 

I am aware of the problems of upgrading GD, however the old one 
(as I explained in a reply to this PR) cannot be used anymore. 

We will just have to either modify current ports or wait until  
authors who depended on this library catch up.
